title: cleanthe melaleuca
intro: Cleanthe melaleuca, also known as the tea tree, is a native Australian plant with a long history of use in traditional medicine. The plant's essential oil, extracted from its leaves, contains antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it a powerful tool against infections and skin issues. The tea tree oil has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including acne, wounds, and fungal infections, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of cleanthe melaleuca include topical applications, such as creams and ointments, as well as oral supplements, which have been traditionally used to boost the immune system and promote overall well-being.
